objections.description: Contrast compliance matrix is truncated mid-row (--text-link #8B7... incomplete). Light theme has NO contrast verification at all - only dark theme tested. This violates the accessibility compliance convergence criterion.
objections.suggested_fix: Complete the dark theme matrix and add full light theme contrast verification table. All text/background combinations must meet WCAG AA minimum (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text).

objections.description: Typography token system is completely missing. No font stack, no type scale (h1-h6, body, caption), no line-height tokens, no font-weight tokens. Cannot implement visual hierarchy without these.
objections.suggested_fix: Add complete typography token section with CSS custom properties: --font-family-sans, --font-family-mono, --text-xs through --text-2xl, --leading-tight through --leading-loose, --font-normal/medium/semibold/bold.

objections.description: Spacing system is completely absent. No spacing tokens, no layout grid, no container max-widths. Components cannot maintain consistent rhythm across breakpoints without this.
objections.suggested_fix: Add spacing token scale (--space-1 through --space-16 or --space-xs through --space-2xl) using 4px base unit. Add container widths for 375/768/1440 breakpoints.

objections.description: Motion token system referenced as deliverable but not defined. Spec bans ease/linear but provides NO alternative timing functions. No duration tokens, no easing curves, no reduced-motion handling.
objections.suggested_fix: Add motion tokens: --duration-fast (150ms), --duration-normal (250ms), --duration-slow (400ms), --ease-out-expo, --ease-in-out-quad. Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion) override section.

objections.description: --text-tertiary on bg-elevated marked PROHIBITED but no alternative provided. Designers will use it anyway without guidance.
objections.suggested_fix: Specify approved alternative: use --text-secondary on bg-elevated, or define --text-tertiary-elevated with verified contrast ratio.

objections.description: Section 3.8 (FOUC prevention inline script) referenced but not included. Section 6 (Skeleton variants) referenced but not detailed. Critical for dark-mode-first requirement.
objections.suggested_fix: Add complete Section 3.8 with inline script that reads localStorage/system preference before paint. Add Section 6 with Skeleton component CSS animation specs.

objections.description: StatusBadge uses color-only status indicators (success/warning/error/neutral). WCAG 1.4.1 requires non-color means of conveying information.
objections.suggested_fix: Add icon variants to StatusBadge (checkmark, exclamation, x, circle) alongside color. Ensure screen readers can distinguish status via aria-label.

objections.description: No elevation/shadow tokens despite 'elevated' surfaces referenced throughout component tree. Visual hierarchy will be inconsistent.
objections.suggested_fix: Add shadow token scale (--shadow-sm through --shadow-xl) with matching light/dark theme values. Document which components use which elevation level.

suggestions.description: Add border-radius token system (--radius-sm: 4px, --radius-md: 8px, --radius-lg: 12px, --radius-xl: 16px, --radius-full: 9999px) for consistent component styling.
Add z-index token scale (--z-dropdown, --z-sticky, --z-modal, --z-toast) to prevent stacking context conflicts between Toast, ActionSheet, and other overlays.
Document theme persistence strategy explicitly - localStorage key name, system preference detection order, and rehydration timing to prevent theme flash.
